prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph, quiet tension. Same London living room, evening. Close-up of Naomi's hands holding her iPhone. The phone screen shows a warning notification (⚠️ amber/yellow glow visible on screen — blurred but the warning color is recognizable). Behind, completely out of focus, the TV's bright glow and silhouettes of the family on the sofa create a warm abstract background. The phone screen's cool notification light contrasts with the warm living room ambience. Naomi's dark brown hands and fingers are sharp — she's about to make a decision. Color grading: the phone screen's cool blue-amber light mixes with the warm TV and lamp glow from behind. Film-like desaturation. The contrast between cool screen light and warm room creates visual tension. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. Phone and hands are center-frame. Very shallow depth of field isolates the hands from the completely blurred background. The TV glow creates a warm halo behind the phone. Camera: 85mm lens, f/1.8, ISO 400. Film grain. Phone screen creates subtle light bloom on her hands. Background is pure abstract bokeh — warm golden shapes. The mood is a quiet problem that isn't panic — 'the AI has already found an alternative.' Tension mixed with trust. A parent processing information the children don't see.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, face visible, bright room, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration
